tool.name: maps_bulk_search
tool.description: Search multiple queries on Google Maps in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling maps_search_places multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all queries as a single comma-separated string. Example: 'cafes in Berlin,restaurants in Berlin,bars in Berlin'.

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Comma-separated search queries (e.g. 'pizza in NYC,sushi in LA,tacos in Austin')
